# Semantic Lines

This sentence is complete on one source line.
This second sentence is also complete on one source line.

This is a very long complete sentence that stays on one physical source line because source reviewability depends on preserving the complete semantic unit rather than wrapping at an arbitrary editor column.

For substantive workflow-managed work:

- use the proposal gate as the automation boundary;
- review and improve the proposal manually;
- continue only after formal proposal review is clean.

```bash
python scripts/example-command.py --with a-long-option --and another-option
```

| Stage | Owner |
| --- | --- |
| proposal | proposal |
| spec | spec |

[example]: https://example.com/some/really/long/url/that/should/not/be/treated/as/prose/wrap
